---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# underlying operation


## get_trace

```{julia}
@doc get_trace
```

>get_trace(ρ::MPO)

## apply_map

```{julia}
@doc apply_map
```

apply_map(map::Vector{ITensor},state::MPO,s::Vector{Index{Int64}},ξ::Vector{Index{Int64}})

>revise the indices of MPO from (s', s) to (ξ', ξ), then merging with the map.
>I think which is the source code of get_expect_shadow(Vector{AbstractShadow})
